recommendations.title: Piku
recommendations.overview: A taxi driver is caught between a dysfunctional relationship between a woman and her father as he drives them to Kolkata.

recommendations.title: Vicky Donor
recommendations.overview: A man is brought in by an infertility doctor to supply him with his sperm, where he becomes the biggest sperm donor for his clinic.

recommendations.title: Madras Cafe
recommendations.overview: An Indian intelligence agent journeys to a war-torn coastal island to break a resolute rebel group and meets a passionate journalist.

recommendations.title: October
recommendations.overview: Dan, a 21-year-old carefree boy is always surrounded by a bunch of friends and fellow hotel interns who feed off each other's everyday moments, their ups and downs. Shiuli is also an intern working in the same hotel, who at times is at a receiving en

recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.

recommendations.title: Selma
recommendations.overview: "Selma," as in Alabama, the place where segregation in the South was at its worst, leading to a march that ended in violence, forcing a famous statement by President Lyndon B. Johnson that ultimately led to the signing of the Voting Rights Act.

recommendations.title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
recommendations.overview: The true story of the "Flying Sikh" world champion runner and Olympian Milkha Singh who overcame the massacre of his family, civil war during the India-Pakistan partition, and homelessness to become one of India's most iconic athletes.

recommendations.title: Never Look Away
recommendations.overview: German artist Kurt Barnert has escaped East Germany and now lives in West Germany, but is tormented by his childhood under the Nazis and the GDR regime.

recommendations.title: Bloody Sunday
recommendations.overview: The dramatised story of the Irish civil rights protest march on January 30 1972 which ended in a massacre by British troops.

recommendations.title: Iceman
recommendations.overview: The Ötztal Alps, more than 5300 years ago. A Neolithic clan leader must avenge the massacre of his people and theft of his holy shrine.
